task:
Build this app in Clear:

**AI Ticket Categorizer** (Level 9)

Build an AI agent that categorizes support tickets. Define a Categorizer agent that returns { category, priority, suggested_action }. Tickets table stores the result. POST /api/tickets receives { subject, description } and returns the categorized ticket.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority

# Define a Categorizer agent
# POST /api/t
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority
  suggested_action

agent 'Categorizer' receives ticket:
  result = ask claude 'You are a support ticket categorizer. Analyze the ticket and return a JSON object with: category (one of: billing, technical, account, other), priority (one of: low, medium, high, urgent), and suggested_action (a brief action string).' with ticket returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
    suggested_action
  send back result

when user sends data to /api/tickets:
  categorized = call 'Categorizer' with data
  data's category is categorized's category
  data's priority is categorized's priority
  data's suggested_action is categorized's suggested_action
  ticket = save data to Tickets
  send back ticket with status 201

when user calls GET /api/tickets:
  send back all Tickets
